creator: qjail1@a1poweruser.com
text: Still unclear. You don't have access to original source for 4.9. How are you going to patch it? Are YOU going to change the 4.9 make files and introduce the patch that way? On the other hand I could just change the 4.9 source file that the port fetches. Then no need for any changes on the port part and 211275 can then just be canceled.
